productDisplayName: Puma Men Classic Graphic  Navy Blue T-shirt
description: Composition Navy blue T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, round ribbed neckline, fabric tape detailing on the in-seam of the neckline, graphic print on the front and brand badge on the right sleeve Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in cool water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Run those marathons with ease in this ultra-comfortable cotton T-shirt from puma. Designed to wick sweat away and keep you fresh and comfortable all day, this tee looks great with shorts and sports shoes. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
